title: Atomic Babies
description: This mod takes the babies Minecraft update to the extreme.
body:
# I Ruined Minecraft's Next Update
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/GG3cbljn_0o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This mod was made for CragDyna's "I Ruined Minecraft's Next Update" it adds a variety of weird and unique features and will provide a stunning (and hilarious) adventure for you and your friends.

## Dependencies

**This mod requires geckolib to run player animations
**

## This mod takes the baby update to the extreme, by adding:

- Baby Potion
- Big Potion
- Baby/ball/dot/subatomic Pig
- Baby/ball/dot/subatomic Cow
- Baby/ball/dot/subatomic Chicken
- Atomic Dimension
- Atomic wood blocks
- Atomic stone blocks
- Atomic Cobblestone blocks
- Atomic wood tools
- Atomic stone tools
- Big Tools
- Atoms
- Big Atoms
- Chicken Nuggets
- Steak Nuggets
- Very Small Bacon
